Promoted as HR_BMK_MOFA2_jDR_cancer_2021. Use bounded claim only: supports sparse/interpretable latent factors and clinical/survival-associated features; do not claim MOFA2 is globally best for clustering or all multiome integration.
Highly recent OT framework (2025). Third-party independent benchmarking is scarce. Defer benchmark requirement and rely on primary method self-evaluation.
Waddington-OT is a highly specific mathematical framework rather than a general-purpose trajectory tool. Keep caveat: strictly requires highly dense time-series sampling to function properly.

Original linear model framework for Perturb-seq. Lacks modern generalized benchmarks against deep learning methods. Keep caveat: historically significant but may lack expressivity for complex modern multimodal datasets.

Promoted as HR_BMK_scVelo_velocity_unraveled_2022. This is caveat/negative-control evidence, not a positive ranking; reports must mention sensitivity to kNN smoothing, embedding choices, and kinetic assumptions.
